must_detect.matched_text:
Parties: Aurora Harbor Technologies Limited (Main Board issuer; illustrative stock code “0000.XH”) as purchaser and Pearl Mosaic Holdings Limited as target; Riverstone Capital Fund I LP as investor.
Transaction: Proposed acquisition of 60% of the issued shares of Pearl Mosaic Holdings Limited by Aurora Harbor Technologies Limited, with concurrent subscription by Riverstone for exchangeable “Skyline Ledger Notes”.
Consideration: To be set within a fair value range supported by an independent valuation; payment mix (cash/new shares/notes) to be finalised in definitive agreements.
Funding: Internal resources of Aurora Harbor Technologies Limited and proceeds from Riverstone’s investment; no margin financing or collateral over customer assets contemplated.
Regulatory status: Expected classification as a major transaction under Chapter 14 of the Hong Kong listing rules (to be confirmed); not a connected transaction under Chapter 14A based on current analysis; circular and independent shareholders’ approval at a special general meeting to be obtained if required.
Compliance and disclosure: Parties acknowledge obligations on inside information under the Securities and Futures Ordinance; unannounced price-sensitive terms (if any) will be disclosed via the issuer’s publication platform; personal data will be handled in accordance with the issuer’s Harbour Shield Data Policy and applicable Hong Kong privacy law.
Employment and integration: Standard retention, non-solicit and transitional services to be agreed; the Inclusive Pathways Charter affirms diversity, equity and inclusion across teams without collecting sensitive attributes unrelated to the transaction.
Public/stale product references: The target’s 2025 launch of “CoralPay” wallet and “Bamboo Cloud” services was previously announced and forms part of the public domain; no trophies from the Kowloon Meteors or souvenirs from Dragon’s Back hikes are assets of the target.
Due diligence scope: Legal, financial, tax and IT reviews only; no collection of biometric, genetic or health records, and no scraping of end-user data; limited data room with redactions and role-based access controls.
Special note (employment data—consented): Employee Ref: EA-0471 (a prospective secondee) has voluntarily disclosed membership in the Harbour Tech Employees Union for conflict assessment; processing limited to this purpose with explicit consent and retained for the minimum period necessary.
Confidentiality: Mutual NDA to be executed; notices and queries to compliance@auroraharbor.example (role mailbox).
Announcements: Any shareholder communication or announcement to be coordinated through the issuer’s standard channels and timetable; no forward-looking statements will be released without agreed wording.
Exclusivity and costs: 60-day no-shop from countersignature; each party bears its own costs; break fee, if any, to be discussed in definitive documentation.
Governing law and binding effect: Governed by the laws of Hong Kong; this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity and costs; public enquiries line: 800-000-000.
